title: HELM Rollback Plan v1
description: Machine-checkable rollback plan attached to a capability manifest or an individual effect receipt. Implements the reversibility policy classes in docs/governance/reversibility-classes.md. Status: preview — schema only.

strategy.description: exact_undo/compensating_action reuse the effect_type_definition/v2 vocabulary; snapshot_restore covers state-snapshot based recovery (filesystem, database, device state).

effect_receipt_ref.description: When the plan is bound to one specific executed effect rather than a capability class.

action_ref.description: capability_id of the compensating/undo action. Must itself resolve to a certified capability manifest.

parameters_template.description: Parameter template with references into the original effect's receipt fields.

method.description: receipt_pairing: compensating effect receipt must reference the original receipt id. state_digest_match: post-rollback state digest must equal the pre-effect digest recorded in the original receipt. human_attestation: signed human confirmation; weakest, only where no machine check exists.

guarantee_expiry.description: Time after which rollback is no longer guaranteed (e.g. downstream propagation). Absent means no known expiry.
